Scalar extraction from an adgeMatrix

Source: R/methods-dense.R
adgeMatrix-extract2.Rd

[[ extracts a single element of an adgeMatrix, matching base matrix semantics: A[[i]] selects the i-th element in column-major order, and A[[i, j]] selects the element in row i, column j. Without this method A[[1]] fails with “this S4 class is not subsettable” (as it does for a bare dgeMatrix).

Usage

# S4 method for class 'adgeMatrix'
x[[i, j, ...]]

Arguments

x

An adgeMatrix.

i, j

Element subscripts, following base matrix [[ semantics.

...

Unused.

Value

A length-one numeric value.

Details

The host copy is materialized before extraction (transparently downloading from the device for GPU-resident objects), so the returned value always reflects the current contents.

Examples

A <- adgeMatrix(matrix(1:6, 2, 3))
A[[1]]
#> [1] 1
A[[2, 3]]
#> [1] 6

On this page
